transcript: The doctor has made their choice.
Seer, wake up. Choose someone to inspect.
Seer, close your eyes.
The seer has received a vision.
Bodyguard, wake up. Choose someone to guard.
Bodyguard, close your eyes.
The bodyguard stands watch.
Vigilante, wake up. You may take your shot or hold your fire.
The vigilante has made a deadly choice.
The vigilante holds their fire.
Witch, wake up. Choose whether to use your potion.
The healing potion has been used.
The poison has been poured.
The witch saves her potions for another night.
Serial killer, wake up. Choose your victim.
Serial killer, close your eyes.
The killer has marked someone for death.
Someone did not survive the night.
No one died last night.
The night was cruel. More than one soul was lost.
Someone was saved from death.
A bodyguard gave their life to protect another.
The village wakes to tragedy.
The village wakes, uneasy but alive.
Vote carefully. A mistake may doom the village.
The village chooses to spare everyone for now.
The vote is tied. No one is eliminated.
The village has condemned one of its own.
A majority has spoken. The judgment is final.
No clear judgment was reached.
The host ends the discussion. The village must now decide.
The werewolves are gone. The village survives another night.
The village has won. The shadows have been driven out and the truth has survived.
The werewolves have won. The village belongs to the night.
The werewolves have taken control. The village falls silent beneath the moon.
The jester has won. The village was fooled and madness takes the crown.
The serial killer stands alone. Everyone else was merely part of the story.
A lone player has claimed victory. The village never saw it coming.
You are a villager. You have no night power, but your vote matters. Watch for lies, trust carefully, and help eliminate every werewolf.
You are a werewolf. Each night, choose someone to kill with your pack. During the day, blend in, lie well, and avoid suspicion.
You are the seer. Each night, inspect one player and learn whether they are a werewolf. Use your knowledge carefully.
You are the doctor. Each night, protect one player from death. You may save the village if you choose wisely.
You are the jester. Your goal is to be voted out during the day. Act suspicious, confuse the village, and trick them into condemning you.
You are the vigilante. Once per game, you may shoot one player at night. A good shot can save the village. A bad shot can destroy it.
You are the bodyguard. Each night, guard one player. If they are attacked, you die in their place.
You are the mayor. Your vote carries extra weight. Lead the village carefully because power makes you a target.
You are the witch. You have a healing potion and a poison potion. Each can only be used once. Timing is everything.
You are the serial killer. You work alone. Kill quietly, survive the chaos, and become the last threat standing.
Your choice has been recorded.
Your choice is locked. Wait for the others.
Cast your vote before it is too late.
The host has moved the village forward.
The masks fall. Every role is now revealed.
The final judgment is here.
The first night begins. Trust no one.
Night returns. The village holds its breath.
The first day begins. Introduce yourselves, but guard your secrets.
Another day begins. The survivors must speak.
Once the vote is cast, there may be no turning back.
You are dead. Watch the village from the shadows.
The game begins. Secrets have been dealt, and the village is no longer safe.
The village resets. A new nightmare begins.
